name: filosign-oss
description: Open-source Filosign protocol, contracts, and independent proof verification

scripts.test: bun run --filter '@filosign/*' test && bun run --filter verify-web test
scripts.check: bun run --filter '@filosign/*' check && bun run --filter verify-web check
scripts.check-types: bun run --filter '@filosign/*' check-types && bun run --filter verify-web check-types
scripts.build: bun run --filter '@filosign/verify' build && bun run --filter verify-web build
